message:
fix(fcp-async-core): saturating instant addition prevents overflow-to-zero deadline collapse

When a Duration is too large for Instant::checked_add, the previous
unwrap_or(epoch) fallback would create an already-expired deadline,
causing Deadline::after(huge_duration) to collapse to immediate timeout.

Introduce saturating_instant_add that binary-searches for the maximum
representable instant when overflow occurs, so shutdown budgets and
timeouts degrade gracefully instead of becoming zero. Add SpawnFuture
and SpawnFn type aliases for readability. Three new tests validate
the overflow, deadline, and task_group_shutdown behaviors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
